OKKIO is a Berlin-based subscription design service delivering high-quality, custom designs tailored to your needs. Let’s explore how we can support your project and find the perfect plan for you.

Creative Services We Offer

Creative Services We Offer

What's Included

From web design to packaging, OKKIO offers a comprehensive range of creative services tailored to your brand. Whether you need stunning visuals, a unique corporate identity, or captivating 3D designs, we’ve got you covered.

From web design to packaging, OKKIO offers a comprehensive range of creative services tailored to your brand.

Recent Projects & Work

Recent Projects & Work

Client Work

Explore the projects we've brought to life for our clients. Each piece reflects our dedication to quality, creativity, and providing tailored design solutions that meet unique needs and goals.

caresser

Corporate-and Campaign Design

Caresser is a graduation project for a fictional outdoor and sports brand, consisting of corporate design, sneaker campaign, website, and Instagram presence. The logo, color palette, and visual identity combine urban aesthetics with a connection to nature. The designed sneaker merges functionality and style, while the campaign visualizes the brand’s values through powerful imagery and a strong online presence.

3D-Modell wird geladen...

caresser

Caresser is a graduation project for a fictional outdoor and sports brand, consisting of corporate design, sneaker campaign, website, and Instagram presence. The logo, color palette, and visual identity combine urban aesthetics with a connection to nature. The designed sneaker merges functionality and style, while the campaign visualizes the brand’s values through powerful imagery and a strong online presence.

.redetzky

Corporate-and Campaign Design

Caresser is a graduation project for a fictional outdoor and sports brand, consisting of corporate design, sneaker campaign, website, and Instagram presence. The logo, color palette, and visual identity combine urban aesthetics with a connection to nature. The designed sneaker merges functionality and style, while the campaign visualizes the brand’s values through powerful imagery and a strong online presence.

.redetzky

Corporate-and Campaign Design

Caresser is a graduation project for a fictional outdoor and sports brand, consisting of corporate design, sneaker campaign, website, and Instagram presence. The logo, color palette, and visual identity combine urban aesthetics with a connection to nature. The designed sneaker merges functionality and style, while the campaign visualizes the brand’s values through powerful imagery and a strong online presence.

Play fair!

Campaign Design

For the EM 2024, we created a comprehensive campaign for Fair Trade Berlin, merging fair trade values with football culture. The campaign includes poster design, social media assets, illustrations, city video walls, and merchandise. Using a bold, minimal visual approach with clear messaging, the campaign draws attention to ethical consumption and fair production, while visually connecting the energy of the tournament with the values of responsibility and sustainability across all platforms.

Play fair!

Campaign Design

For the EM 2024, we created a comprehensive campaign for Fair Trade Berlin, merging fair trade values with football culture. The campaign includes poster design, social media assets, illustrations, city video walls, and merchandise. Using a bold, minimal visual approach with clear messaging, the campaign draws attention to ethical consumption and fair production, while visually connecting the energy of the tournament with the values of responsibility and sustainability across all platforms.

What makes OKKIO So Great

What makes OKKIO So Great

Why OKKIO

Discover the benefits of choosing OKKIO. Our work delivers creative solutions that combine quality, flexibility, and efficiency. With OKKIO, you benefit from a dedicated team that brings your vision to life quickly and precisely.

Plans & Pricing

Choose from our pricing plans – each tailored to different levels of design needs. Pay per plan and enjoy full flexibility. Quality design, made simple.

Think landing pages, branding, 3D mockups – the solid stuff that builds your brand

About us

About us

We design
for you

We’re OKKIO – a small, independent Berlin based design studio working remotely across the world. We do web, branding, and 3D – clear, thoughtful, and always tailored. Through our plan based model, we offer flexible design support without the agency fuss. We like good coffee, dogs, clean grids, and helping brands look sharp without overcomplicating things.

Teres

I’m Teres – graphic designer, co-founder of OKKIO, and a big fan of good grids, early flights, and visual clarity. I studied for three years at Lette-Verein Berlin, where I learned design hands-on and applied. I love to travel, explore new places (ideally with my dog), and see the world through design eyes—because design is everywhere: in signs, sidewalks, shadows. You just have to notice.

Florian

I’m Florian – designer, co-founder of OKKIO, and someone who’s always chasing the intersection of tech and aesthetics. I’m half French, half German, and studied design at Lette-Verein Berlin, where Teres and I met. I love building systems that work beautifully, traveling with as little as possible, and the freedom of working from the road. I ride motorcycles, care deeply about animals, and enjoy seeing the world from unexpected angles.
